arts.ttl: PSG set to send Milan Škriniar on loan to Fenerbahçe
arts.sum: As reported first by Yağız Sabuncuoğlu and confirmed by Fabrice Hawkins, Fenerbahçe have reached an agreement in principle with Paris Saint-Germain for Milan Škriniar (29). Hawkins adds that the Slovakian…

arts.ttl: Fenerbahce set to beat Spurs to centre-back signing
arts.sum: Fenerbahce have agreed a deal in principle to sign Milan Skriniar from Paris Saint-Germain. The Turkish side have reached an agreement to bring the out-of-favour defender to Istanbul, beating competition from clubs around Europe. 🚨🟡🔵 Fenerbahçe agree deal in principle to sign Milan Škriniar and winning the race over more than 3 clubs! Verbal agreement […] The post Fenerbahce set to beat Spurs to centre-back signing first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Fenerbahce agree deal for Villa's Diego Carlos
arts.sum: Turkish side Fenerbahce agree a deal with Aston Villa to sign Brazilian centre-back Diego Carlos.

arts.ttl: Diego Carlos' move to Fenerbahce is back ON! Aston Villa defender opts to join Jose Mourinho in Turkey despite late Wolves swoop
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The Aston Villa defender was due to join Fenerbahce on Monday but the deal was held up as Wolves made a move for the 31-year-old. owever, Carlos has opted to join up with Mourinho.

arts.ttl: Major Diego Carlos Aston Villa transfer update given as Fenerbahce release statement
arts.sum: A statement released by Fenerbahce via social media reads: "Our club has reached an agreement in principle with the club for the transfer of Diego Carlos, who plays for Aston Villa. Fenerbahce have confirmed that an agreement in principle has been reached with Aston Villa for the transfer of Diego Carlos .
